query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Here are the FERC docket numbers for filings submitted by Google (Google LLC / Google Energy LLC) between June 1 and Dec 31, 2024:

- ER10-468-005 (filed 06/28/2024)  
- ER24-2888-000 (part of doc-less motion to intervene, filed 09/19/2024)  
- ER24-2889-000 (part of doc-less motion to intervene, filed 09/19/2024)  
- ER24-2890-000 (part of doc-less motion to intervene, filed 09/19/2024)  
- ER24-2891-000 (part of doc-less motion to intervene, filed 09/19/2024)  
- ER24-2893-000 (part of doc-less motion to intervene, filed 09/19/2024)  
- ER24-2894-000 (part of doc-less motion to intervene, filed 09/19/2024)  
- ER10-2835-011 (filed 11/05/2024)  
- ER10-2835-012 (filed 12/27/2024)  
- AD24-11-000 (post-technical conference comments, filed 12/10/2024)

If you want, I can fetch the PDF download URLs or save the full search CSV returned by the FERC tool.
